'''√s-ch-v''' ('''kasachav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deauthorize|deauthorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deauthorize|deauthorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √s-ch-v
|-
! Lemma
| kasachav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thisachav || jisachav || shisachav || kisachav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthusachav || jujusachav || shushusachav || kukusachav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thusachav || jusachav || shusachav || kusachav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thusachav || jusachav || shusachav || kusachav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thesachav || jesachav || shesachav || kesachav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothosachav || jojosachav || shoshosachav || kokosachav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thosachav || josachav || shosachav || kosachav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thosachav || josachav || shosachav || kosachav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sachav || sachav || sachav || sachav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sachav || sachav || sachav || sachav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sachav || sachav || sachav || sachav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sachav || sachav || sachav || sachav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæsachav || jæsachav || shæsachav || kæsachav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathasachav || jajasachav || shashasachav || kakasachav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thasachav || jasachav || shasachav || kasachav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thasachav || jasachav || shasachav || kasachav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shasachav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshasachav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishasachav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shasachavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshasachavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishasachavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shasachavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshasachavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishasachavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shasachavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshasachavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishasachavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shasachavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshasachavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishasachavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shasachavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshasachavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishasachavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shasachavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshasachavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishasachavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shasachavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshasachavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishasachavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shasachavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshasachavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishasachavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shasachavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshasachavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishasachavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shasachavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasachavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasachavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shasachavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshasachavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasachavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shasachavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshasachavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishasachavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shasachavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasachavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasachavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shasachavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshasachavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasachavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shasachavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshasachavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishasachavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shasachavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshasachavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishasachavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shasachavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshasachavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasachavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shasachavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshasachavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishasachavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shasachavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshasachavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishasachavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shasachavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasachavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasachavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
